name: Embedded Developer
description: Perfect for teams that need to add specific technical skills or scale up sprint velocity.
features: Direct integration into your Slack & tools

monthly.caption: Flexible monthly rolling contract for immediate capacity.

yearly.caption: Long-term partnership for ongoing roadmap execution.

name: Augmented Team
description: Built for teams shipping major product features or scaling their engineering footprint.
features: Fully aligned to your timezone & standups
Scales up or down with 2 weeks notice

monthly.caption: Flexible scaling for teams pushing major product roadmap milestones.

yearly.caption: The strongest fit for long-term product lines and division scaling.

name: Project Squad
description: A cross-functional squad assembled to deliver a specific product or feature from discovery through launch.

monthly.caption: Best for founders launching a new product without an in-house engineering team.

yearly.caption: Ideal for ongoing multi-product delivery, support, and continuous feature expansion.
